## Goal

What repeated friction or missing capability should this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the improvement.

## Why it matters

Explain the impact on:

- workflow quality
- reviewability
- token cost
- durable knowledge
- automation

## Possible implementation notes

Add examples or constraints if you have them.
